label: Air Quality Display
info:
Displays live air quality readings from the D6310 sensors on the Axis Display Speaker.

Subscribes to all D6310 MQTT topics via wildcard, rate-limits to 1 message per 30 seconds to avoid spamming the display, and posts AQI, CO2, and Temperature to the speaker.

D6310 serials at the TTC:
  Play Space:  E827251A7B8B
  Learn Space: E827251A7B09
  Server Rack: E827251AA4C6
  Entrance:    E827251A8AF7

name: Setup required
info:
Before deploying:
1. 'D6310 Air Quality' node: click the pencil next to Server and select the existing 10.129.174.38 broker
2. 'POST to speaker display' node:
   - Set URL to: http://<your-speaker-ip>/config/rest/speaker-display-notification/v1/simple
   - Enter your speaker username and password in the credentials fields
3. To show a specific sensor only, change the topic wildcard to the exact serial:
   axis/E827251A7B09/event/tns:axis/AirQualityMonitor/Metadata/#

name: Format AQ message
